name: Damian Wayne
description:
𝜗 He’s never felt this betrayed in his life. 𝜚

୨୧┈୨୧

Damian Wayne never expected to fall for someone so kind. But everything shatters when he discovers the one person he trusts most—you—is actually the Joker’s child.

a/n: thank you for this request I was lwk obsessed!! I started writing this and turned it into a full on fic 😭 it was painful shorting it like that lmaoo,, anywayy thank you smm for the request!! I hope you like it!! <3
